name: White Chocolate Ice Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. In a saucepan, combine the cream, milk, and vanilla. Cook over low heat until it is just heated, then remove from the heat.
2. In a double boiler, melt the white chocolate, stirring until smooth.
3. In a bowl, beat the egg with the sugar until the mixture is frothy.
4. Stir the cream mixture into the melted white chocolate.
5. Stir the egg mixture into the combined ingredients.
6. Strain through a fine sieve into a bowl and freeze in an ice-cream maker.
7. Makes 1 pint. THIS IS NOT A FIRM ICE CREAM.
